title: Comprehensive Exam Prep (Doctoral Level)
description: Comprehensive Exam Prep for Doctoral Level students.

lectures.title: Breadth Exam Review — Part 1
learning_objectives: Understand introduction to breadth exam review

scene_blocks.narration_prompt: Welcome to Introduction to Breadth Exam Review. In this lesson, we explore the key ideas.

scene_blocks.narration_prompt: Let's dive deeper into Breadth Exam Review. This is essential for mastering Comprehensive Exam Prep.

scene_blocks.narration_prompt: To summarize what we've learned about Breadth Exam Review: the key takeaway is understanding the fundamentals.
scene_blocks.visual_prompt: Summary slide with key terms

coding_lab.task: Implement concepts from Breadth Exam Review — Part 1
